items.title: Top 10 best music gear so far in 2023
items.summary: Explore the top 10 music gear of 2023, featuring innovative tools for musicians, including the Soundbrenner Core Steel and Genki Wave Ring.
items.snippet: 2023 is proving to be an exciting year for musicians. From cutting-edge tech to beloved classics, the world of music gear is buzzing with options. In this blog, we'll walk you through the top 10 pieces of gear that have caught our attention this year. P.S. We at Soundbrenner are hosting a massive giveaway (worth US $2500) featuring all the gear mentioned below! You can sign up for it here . (The giveaway ends on the

items.title: Core Limited Edition 2022: Introducing the space cadet blue
items.summary: Introducing the 2022 Core Limited Edition in Space Cadet Blue, a unique watch rig with limited availability. Sign up for priority access and a chance to win one for free!
items.snippet: Something special is launching... Are you ready to take your music practice to new heights? Introducing the all new 2022 Core Limited Edition in Space Cadet Blue . Voted by YOU, our musician community, as our top color choice of 2022. Only 250 units will be available upon its first release. items.title: Weird instruments: Our top 6 picks in the world of music
items.summary: Explore our top 6 picks of weird instruments that redefine music with their unique sounds and designs.
items.snippet: Imagine a world where rhythm isn't just carried by drums and guitars, but by instruments so bizarre that they redefine the very essence of music. Today, we embark on a journey into the realm of sonic oddities - the top 6 weird instruments that add a refreshing and unconventional twist to the symphony of sounds. 1. items.title: 16 best Valentine's Day gifts for musicians 2025
items.summary: Discover the 16 best Valentine's Day gifts for musicians, from headphones to personalized drumsticks, perfect for your loved one.
items.snippet: Do you have a musician in your life and want to get them something special for Valentine’s Day? If you don’t play an instrument yourself, it can be hard to know what to pick. That’s why we’ve compiled this list of the best Valentine’s gifts for musicians. 1. items.title: Top 5 instruments you can easily take to the beach
items.summary: Discover the top 5 musical instruments perfect for enhancing your beach experience. From ukuleles to bongo drums, make your seaside days more enjoyable!
items.snippet: If you're planning a sun-soaked day at the beach, why not add some sweet melodies to the mix? Music and the beach go hand in hand, and having the right beach instruments can elevate your seaside experience to a whole new level of fun and relaxation. items.title: 7 rockin’ Father’s Day gifts for music-loving dads
items.summary: Discover the ultimate guide to the best Father's Day gifts for music-loving dads, featuring unique and practical items that will keep him playing and smiling all year long.
items.snippet: Father’s Day is coming up fast, and if you’re hunting for the perfect present for your music-loving dad, look no further. Here’s your ultimate guide to the best Father’s Day gifts for musicians, designed to keep him playing, grooving, and smiling all year long. 1. items.title: Core 2: Firmware and App March 2020 Update
items.summary: Discover the latest updates for the Soundbrenner Core 2, including new features, bug fixes, and firmware enhancements.
items.snippet: We’re excited to announce the first software and firmware update for the Soundbrenner Core 2. Our engineers have been hard at work to enhance your experience. Here are things you don't want to miss out on: New New language selection menu for the Core 2. It will automatically change its language to match your phone’s language when unlocked. Added the ability to toggle the Core 2's time format from 12-hour to 24-hour.

items.summary: Discover the Soundbrenner Core Steel Limited Edition 2022, a unique tool for musicians, featuring exclusive design elements and a limited release of only 777 units.
items.snippet: Soundbrenner Core Steel Limited Edition 2022 At Soundbrenner, we believe that every musician should express themselves through their uniqueness, whether that be through the type of music they play or their creative expression. items.title: A year-end letter from Soundbrenner 2022
items.summary: Reflecting on 2022, Soundbrenner celebrates significant milestones and new features for musicians, while looking forward to an even better 2023.
items.snippet: Taking a look back at 2022... This year, our app and wearables were used in over 12 million music sessions, totaling over 5 million hours of practice. Converted into years, that's over 600 years' worth of music created with our products! 🥰 When we started Soundbrenner a few years ago, we could only dream of bringing so much musicality to the world.
